---
title: Fast Interactive Figures (OJS)
---

This page keeps the existing `shinylive` chapter untouched and adds a faster front-end companion built with Observable JS. The curves are rendered directly in the browser, and repeated parameter combinations are cached locally so the sliders stay responsive.

For the full derivation and the original notebook-based version, see [Field integration for 4-point interactions](CH0.ipynb).

```{ojs}
import {
  quarticFigure,
  freeEnergyFigure,
  densityPotentialFigure,
  cooperInstabilityFigure,
  channelCompareFigure,
  densityRpaFigure,
  rpaFreeEnergyFigure,
  exchangeFigure,
  bcsFigure
} from "./ojs/eliashberg-plots.js"

legendSwatch = (item) => {
  if (item.kind === "point") {
    return htl.html`<span class="ojs-legend-point" style=${{color: item.color}}></span>`
  }
  const dashMap = {
    solid: "solid",
    dashed: "dashed",
    dotted: "dotted",
    dashdot: "dashed"
  }
  return htl.html`<span class="ojs-legend-line" style=${{
    color: item.color,
    borderTopStyle: dashMap[item.dash ?? "solid"]
  }}></span>`
}

renderLegend = (items, note = null) => htl.html`
  <aside class="ojs-legend">
    <div class="ojs-legend-list">
      ${items.map((item) => htl.html`
        <div class="ojs-legend-item">
          ${legendSwatch(item)}
          <span>${item.label}</span>
        </div>
      `)}
    </div>
    ${note ? htl.html`<div class="ojs-legend-note">${note}</div>` : ""}
  </aside>
`

figureShell = (body, items, note = null) => htl.html`
  <div class="ojs-figure-shell">
    <div class="ojs-figure-body">${body}</div>
    ${renderLegend(items, note)}
  </div>
`
```

## Quartic Action vs Quadratic Approximation

```{ojs}
viewof quarticA = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 10, step: 0.1, label: "a"})
viewof quarticB = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 1, step: 0.1, label: "b"})

quartic = quarticFigure({Plot, a: quarticA, b: quarticB})
figureShell(quartic.plot, quartic.legend, quartic.note)
```

## Free Energy vs Interaction Strength

```{ojs}
viewof freeEnergyA = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 10, step: 0.1, label: "a"})
viewof freeEnergyBMax = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 5, step: 0.1, label: "max b"})

freeEnergy = freeEnergyFigure({Plot, a: freeEnergyA, bMax: freeEnergyBMax})
figureShell(freeEnergy.plot, freeEnergy.legend, freeEnergy.note)
```

## Density-Channel Potential: Exact vs RPA

```{ojs}
viewof densityEpsilon = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 1, step: 0.1, label: "epsilon"})
viewof densityVMax = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 0.8, step: 0.1, label: "max V"})

densityPotential = densityPotentialFigure({Plot, epsilon: densityEpsilon, vMax: densityVMax})
figureShell(densityPotential.plot, densityPotential.legend, densityPotential.note)
```

## Bosonic Cooper Instability

```{ojs}
viewof cooperG = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 0.8, step: 0.1, label: "g"})
viewof cooperEpsilon = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 1, step: 0.1, label: "epsilon"})

cooperInstability = cooperInstabilityFigure({Plot, g: cooperG, epsilon: cooperEpsilon})
figureShell(cooperInstability.plot, cooperInstability.legend, cooperInstability.note)
```

## Direct vs Cooper Channel

```{ojs}
viewof channelEpsilon = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 1, step: 0.1, label: "epsilon"})
viewof channelGDirect = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "g (direct)"})
viewof channelGCooper1 = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "g (cooper 1)"})
viewof channelGCooper2 = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 0.2, step: 0.1, label: "g (cooper 2)"})

channelCompare = channelCompareFigure({
  Plot,
  epsilon: channelEpsilon,
  gDirect: channelGDirect,
  gCooper1: channelGCooper1,
  gCooper2: channelGCooper2
})

figureShell(
  htl.html`<div class="ojs-plot-grid">${channelCompare.leftPlot}${channelCompare.rightPlot}</div>`,
  channelCompare.legend,
  channelCompare.note
)
```

## Density Channel: Exact vs RPA Expansion

```{ojs}
viewof densityBeta = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 5, step: 0.1, label: "beta"})
viewof densityCgAbs = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 1, step: 0.1, label: "|Cg|"})
viewof densityXi = Inputs.range([0.1, 5], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "xi"})

densityRpa = densityRpaFigure({Plot, beta: densityBeta, cgAbs: densityCgAbs, xi: densityXi})
figureShell(densityRpa.plot, densityRpa.legend, densityRpa.note)
```

## RPA Free Energy Components

```{ojs}
viewof rpaBeta = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 5, step: 0.1, label: "beta"})
viewof rpaXi = Inputs.range([0.1, 5], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "xi"})
viewof rpaGMax = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 5, step: 0.1, label: "max g"})

rpaFreeEnergy = rpaFreeEnergyFigure({Plot, beta: rpaBeta, xi: rpaXi, gMax: rpaGMax})
figureShell(rpaFreeEnergy.plot, rpaFreeEnergy.legend, rpaFreeEnergy.note)
```

## Exchange Channel: Exact vs Stoner

```{ojs}
viewof exchangeBeta = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 10, step: 0.1, label: "beta"})
viewof exchangeCg = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 2, step: 0.1, label: "Cg"})
viewof exchangeXi1 = Inputs.range([-2, 2], {value: -0.5, step: 0.1, label: "xi_1"})
viewof exchangeXi2 = Inputs.range([-2, 2], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "xi_2"})

exchange = exchangeFigure({Plot, beta: exchangeBeta, Cg: exchangeCg, xi1: exchangeXi1, xi2: exchangeXi2})
figureShell(exchange.plot, exchange.legend, exchange.note)
```

## Cooper Channel: BCS vs Ginzburg-Landau

```{ojs}
viewof bcsBeta = Inputs.range([0.1, 20], {value: 20, step: 0.1, label: "beta"})
viewof bcsCg = Inputs.range([0.1, 10], {value: 0.5, step: 0.1, label: "Cg"})
viewof bcsXi = Inputs.range([0.1, 5], {value: 0.2, step: 0.1, label: "xi"})

bcs = bcsFigure({Plot, beta: bcsBeta, Cg: bcsCg, xi: bcsXi})
figureShell(bcs.plot, bcs.legend, bcs.note)
```
